codeReview.summary: The fix correctly replaces the broken queued follow-up path with deferred idle-time dispatch, but the new callback is never cancelled or invalidated. That leaves a stale continuation able to fire after session state has been reset by a fresh user turn or by shutdown/reload.

issues.description: `agent_end` snapshots `prompt` and schedules an uncancelled `setTimeout` that later calls `dispatchContinuationWhenIdle(pi, ctx, prompt)`, but the only reset paths (`before_agent_start` at lines 128-133 and `session_shutdown` at lines 143-144) mutate `sessionStates` only; they do not cancel or invalidate that pending callback. If a human prompt starts a new turn before `ctx.isIdle()` flips, or the session reloads/shuts down during the 10s polling window, the old callback still reaches `pi.sendUserMessage(prompt)`. `AgentSession.sendUserMessage()` then calls `prompt()` as soon as the session becomes idle (`packages/coding-agent/src/core/agent-session.ts:1295-1299`), so the stale callback can start an extra turn with an outdated todo snapshot after the newer turn or reload finishes. The updated tests only exercise reload after `waitForHarnessToSettle()`, so this race remains uncovered.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mission’s shared architecture/spec still documents the pre-fix `deliverAs: "followUp"` design even though this feature intentionally changes continuation to deferred idle polling plus plain `pi.sendUserMessage(prompt)`. Future workers reviewing the mission docs would be steered back toward the broken behavior unless those shared docs are updated.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/yeongyu/local-workspaces/sanepi-mono/.factory/library/architecture.md:68,136 and /Users/yeongyu/.factory/missions/604eaa29-2cf3-4c01-af2e-35ceedb95304/features.json:392,671-682 still prescribe `deliverAs: "followUp"`, while commit e4b17d9c replaces that path with deferred idle dispatch in continuation/runtime.ts.

summary: Fail: the happy-path auto-dispatch fix works, but the deferred callback is not invalidated on fresh-user/reset or shutdown/reload, so a stale continuation turn can still fire later.
